title: Explore
description: This app contains a perfect example to help you get started.

fileBasedRouting.title: File-based Routing
fileBasedRouting.description: This app contains two screens: {{file1}} and {{file2}}
fileBasedRouting.layoutDescription: The layout file in {{file}} sets up the tab navigator.

platformSupport.title: Android, iOS, and Web Support
platformSupport.description: You can open this project on Android, iOS, and Web. To open the web version, press {{key}} in the terminal that runs this project.

images.title: Images
images.description: For static images, you can use the suffixes {{suffix1}} and {{suffix2}} to provide files for different screen densities

customFonts.title: Custom Fonts
customFonts.description: Open {{file}} to see how to load custom fonts like this.

themes.title: Light and Dark Themes
themes.description: This theme supports light and dark modes. The {{hook}} hook allows you to inspect the current color scheme of the user, and you can adjust the user interface colors accordingly.

animations.title: Animations
animations.description: This theme contains an example of a moving component. The {{component}} component uses the powerful {{library}} library to create a moving animation for the raised hand.
animations.iosDescription: The {{component}} component provides a perspective effect for the main image.
